---
title: '65-68 GTO Station Wagon - Rear Facing Back Seats'
date: '2014-06-29T05:22:00.0050000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '282442775398289645'
blogger_filename: '/2014/06/65-68-gto-station-wagon-rear-facing.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Car'
---

<h4>
This is my dream car:</h4>
<br />
<h3>
65-67 GTO Wagon</h3>
<ul>
<li>Rear facing back seats</li>
<li>Vertical headlights</li>
<li>Chrome front end.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Color Scheme. Exterior and Primary Interior Blue and/or Green - Orange and Black accents.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Polished Allow wheels (Not Chrome) - &nbsp;BF Goodrich Tires White Letters Out.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Modern Hybrid technology - The coolness of Pontiac and the fuel efficiency of a Prius.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Modern stereo and USB for mp3.</li>
<li>Fully functioning air conditioning.</li>
<li>Tow Hitch for Camper trailer.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/65gtowagon-zps65107277-c7007d330270.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/65gtowagon-zps65107277-c7007d330270.jpg" height="194" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/66-gto-wagon-yellow-4d304f34a267.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/66-gto-wagon-yellow-4d304f34a267.jpg" height="129" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/pontiac-gto-wagons-500-15-11d58356ff90.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/pontiac-gto-wagons-500-15-11d58356ff90.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/pontiac-gto-wagons-500-17-c4a95635b748.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/pontiac-gto-wagons-500-17-c4a95635b748.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/pontiac-gto-wagons-500-28-e45160f2d350.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/pontiac-gto-wagons-500-28-e45160f2d350.jpg" height="257" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
